body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
We want to make a pre-release v0.0.1 before we make our first release v0.1.0, since it takes 3 days to register a Julia package for the first time. This will allow us to make our first (real) release in a more timely manner once we're ready.
title: tag v0.0.1 (pre-release)
